items.title: AMLA to Hold Public Hearing on Two Draft RTS

The revised guidelines form part of a broader package d
items.ai_summary: Les autorités de régulation financière européennes révisent les exigences d'évaluation de l'adéquation pour assurer la conformité des banques et entreprises d'investissement.

Damien MILIC, commissaire du Gouvernement,Décide :Article 1Les agents de la direction des contrôles et des sanctions de la Commission nationale de l'informatique et des libertés (CNIL) ci-après désignés et ceux nommés en application du premier alinéa de l'article 41 du décret n° 2019-536 du 29 mai 2019 modifié, sont habilités à établir un rapport en application du cinquième alinéa de l'article 22-1 de la loi du 6 janvier 1978 modifiée :Mme Fabie

items.source_name: ESMA - European Securities and Markets Authority
items.title: ESMA consults on post-trade risk reduction services under EMIR 3
items.summary:
ESMA consults on post-trade risk reduction services under EMIR 3
  
26 February 2026


      
              Post Trading
          
  
            The European Securities and Markets Authority (ESMA), the EU’s financial markets regulator and supervisor, has launched a consultation on the requirements for how post-trade risk reduction (PTRR) services can benefit from the conditioned exemption from the clearing obligation introduced under the European Market Infrastructure Regulation (EMIR 3).
items.ai_summary: Cet article concerne la conformité financière car il porte sur les exigences réglementaires EMIR 3 relatives aux services de réduction des risques post-négociation supervisés par l'ESMA.
items.score_breakdown: +10 mots forts: esma | +10 mots moyens: risk, regulation | +12 Source EU | ×1.5 (<24h)

items.title: Global cybercrime crackdown:  over 373 000 dark web sites shut down
items.summary: On 9 March 2026, a global operation led by German authorities and supported by Europol was launched against one of the largest networks of fraudulent platforms in the dark web. The investigation began in mid-2021 against the dark web platform “Alice with Violence CP”. During the investigation, authorities discovered that the platform’s operator was running more than 373 000 fraudulent websites advertising child sexual abuse material (CSAM) and cybercrime-as-a-service (CaaS) offerings.

items.summary:
ESMA issues a supervisory briefing on algorithmic trading 
  
26 February 2026


      
              Trading
          
  
            The European Securities and Markets Authority (ESMA), the EU’s financial markets regulator and supervisor, today published a supervisory briefing to support consistent supervision of algorithmic trading across the EU. 

      
            
The briefing provides National Competent Authorities (NCAs) with practical tools and clarified expectations for supervi

items.title: ESMA sets out clearing thresholds under EMIR 3
items.summary:
ESMA sets out clearing thresholds under EMIR 3 
  
25 February 2026


      
              Post Trading
          
  
            The European Securities and Markets Authority (ESMA), the EU’s financial markets regulator and supervisor, has published its draft Regulatory Technical Standards (RTS) setting out new and revised clearing thresholds (CTs) under EMIR 3. The proposed thresholds ensure continuity in the coverage of systemic risk in over‑the‑counter (OTC) derivative markets while avoiding
items.ai_summary: ESMA définit les seuils de compensation sous EMIR 3, imposant des obligations de conformité réglementaire sur les dérivés.

items.ai_summary: Les CJIP imposent aux entreprises des programmes de mise en conformité financière pour résoudre des violations détectées par le Parquet.

New UK Fraud Strategy – (2026 – 2029)
items.author: John Cusack
items.summary:
The UK has published its new Anti Fraud Strategy (2026 -2029), which like the last one published in 2023 has much to commend it. The highlight is the Online Crime Centre a public private collaboration that is at last following the Anti Scam Centres set up up by leading countries in Asia including Singapore in 2019 and more substantively in 2022.
It has though one glaring omission. It has no target. This may be because the previous Strategy had one but that didn’t work out so well, so mayb
items.ai_summary: La nouvelle stratégie UK anti-fraude 2026-2029 impose une vigilance accrue sur les risques de fraude pour les compliance officers.

items.title: A l’occasion du 100ème épisode du podcast Quid Juris, le procureur national…
items.summary: A l’occasion du 100ème épisode du podcast Quid Juris, le procureur national financier Pascal Prache a répondu aux questions de Laurent Neumann.Il y évoque notamment le fonctionnement interne du PNF, les enjeux actuels et futurs en matière de grande délinquance économique et financière ou encore la coopération pénale internationale. Le podcast est disponible ici : https://www.leclubdesjuristes.com/les-podcasts/quid-juris-affaires-sarkozy-lang-dati-le-procureur-du-pnf-repond-2-14918/
items.ai_summary: Le procureur national financier expose les enjeux du PNF en matière de délinquance économique et financière.

SEC confirms exemption for directors and officers of EEA Foreign Private Issuers

              Market Abuse

The SEC’s decision mean

items.title: Transparency International France présente son #podcast "Où va l’argent ? Sur la…
items.summary: Transparency International France présente son #podcast "Où va l’argent ? Sur la trace des flux financiers illicites".​🎧 Dans le premier épisode, plongez au cœur de la justice financière et du quotidien des magistrats qui traquent les flux financiers illicites avec Jérôme Simon, Premier vice-procureur au sein du Parquet national financier, qui est en première ligne dans la lutte contre la grande délinquance économique. ​​🔗 Disponible ici : https://radio.amicus-curiae.net/podcast/episod

From Potentates to PEP’s – A 50 year Journey
items.author: John Cusack
items.summary: It is 25 years since the term “Politically Exposed Persons” was first used publicly, and it came from the Chairman of the Swiss Banking Regulator in an address to the Basel Committee on Banking Supervisors in Basel on 21st September, 2000. The need for such a term and to ensure collective international action arose from the experiences of Banks and Banking and their exposures to funds derived from grand corruption largely overseas, dating back to the 1970’s though to the end of the 1990’s
items.ai_summary: Cet article traite de l'évolution du concept de PEP sur 50 ans, essentiel à la conformité pour l'identification des personnes politiquement exposées.

items.title: Epstein Files: Financial Crime Case Study – Lessons Learned
items.author: John Cusack
items.summary:
The Epstein Files: 
When a plane crashes, an investigation is undertaken and a root cause is identified and lessons for the wider aviation industry are learned and new adaptations implemented.
Fighting financial crime should do the same, but “crashes” take years to investigate and partisan findings generate limited results which rarely means adequate programme adjustments are made. 
The case of Jeffrey Epstein is a case in point. This is an almighty plane crash, where investigations every
items.ai_summary: Cet article analyse les lacunes de détection des crimes financiers à travers le cas Epstein et propose des améliorations systémiques.
